title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Shriram Finance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Shriram Finance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Shriram Finance in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Shriram Finance:
Shriram Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shriram Finance!
